titleStmt.title: SII 34.134: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 134. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gives in detail all the items of expenditure (maintenance for five Vēda-brāhmaṇas, musicians, food offerings to deities) for which land had been given by Vēḷān Vīranāraṇaṉ alias Sembiyaṉ Vēdivēḷāṉ after purchase from the sabhā of Peruveṅgūr. [The inscription is full of symbols for fractions written in very cursive form difficult to decipher].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cempiyaṉ vEtivEḷān peruveṅkūr sabhaiyār pakka
l vilaikoṇṭu śrī vimānattu Arddha maṇṭapattu vaṭa cuvark kīḻaikkālppat
tiyilē śilālekhai ceytu kiṭanta nilam nivantam ceyta paricāvatu kiḷiyū
r vāykkālukku vaṭakku malaimēl māṇikkanallūr Ūr Irukkavacca nilam
O Eṭṭumā Itan mēkku kiḷiyūr vāykkālukku vaṭakku veṅkūr vākkālukku kiḻa
kku kōyilkkaṇakkeḻutuvānukku vacca nilam 2 � yum sarasvati vatikku mē
kku vētivēḷ vāykkālukku teṟku veṅkūr vāykkālukku kiḻakku nilam 2 �
yum Ivatikkē mēkku Ivāykkālukkē vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇāṟṟuk kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam 10 3mā �yumāka nilattālum I
ayvar brahamaṇar vētam valākku pērāl nicati kuṟuṇinelāl Arici Irunāḻiyum kāykkaṟi puḻukkukkaṟi puḷikkaṟi p piṭiyum tayir Uriyu
pākku Iraṇṭum veṟṟilai Eṭṭumākac cantirātittaval Ūṭṭuvārākavum tiruvuṇāḻikai santiviḷakku 3 santikkum Eṇṇaimuḻākkum
Irāttiruppalikku kaiy viḷakku 4 kku Eṇṇaiyumāka nāḻikku vacca nilam vatikku mēkku vētivēḷvāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 kaṇāṟṟu mēkka
ṭaiya 4mā � yum 2 kaṇāṟṟu nilam 100 5 10 2 māvum 3 kaṇāṟṟu mēṟkkaṭaiya nilam 2 mā nīkki Itanōṭu maṭaiya nilam3 māvumāka 2(1/2) vēliyum kāḷam 4 caṅku
Iraṇṭumāka Āṟum Ūtum Aṭikaḷmārkku vaccanilam pārvati vatikkum vētivēḷ vāykālukku vaṭakku 3 kaṇṇāṟṟu mēṟkaṭaiya nilam � mitaṟku kiḻakku
nilam3pa nīkki I noṭumaṭaiyaṉā nilam 4 vum vatikkumēkku vētivēḷ vāykkālukku vaṭakku 4 kaṇṇāṟṟu nilam nilam 3 māvumāka nilam Iraṇṭē Eṭṭu
māvum Uvaccumuṉ koṭṭukiṟa Āḷ Āṟinōṭum nālāḷukku vaicca nilam vatikku mēkku vētivēḷ vāykkālukku vaṭakku vaṅkūr vāykkālukku kiḻa
kku 5- kaṇāṟṟu nilam 1 vum mṣabhavāhana perumāḷukku tiruvamutu pōtu Irunāḻi Ariciyum Araipiṭi neyum tayiramitu Uri porikaṟimitu Aṭaikkāyamitu Iraṇṭu veṟṟilai Eṭṭumāka mūnṟu sandhiyum Amitu ceyyavacca nilam pārvativatikku kiḻakku vētivēḷ vāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 kaṇāṟṟu nilam Araiyum Ayana saṅgrān=ti Iraṇṭum vi
ṣu Iraṇṭumāka nālukum snapanamāṭiyaruḷa n=tanābhikku nellu yumāṭiyaruḷa ney pañcakavyatuku ne Akkāraṭalaiyamituku ḷu�4 Amituceya yumāka neyaṟunāḻiyurikku nellu nna Āṭiyaruḷa pāl na kkāraṭalaikku pāl pOnakatukku māka pāl tūṇikku nellu Āṭiyaruḷa tayir Amitu ceya
porratumu paṇatuku ne palan ṟamaṭṭuvārku maramum vum kuraintupaṇiceyan pālikai kīḻaṭṭa puṇyāhamvācipārku pākku veṟṟilaikku nel 5 tiruvamitu ne kalattin kīḻ Aṭṭa sthaṇṭula Arici 3 10 pōnakappaḻavarici Akkāraṭalai A pāl ponakatuku parupu pōnakavarici veṇ
pōṉakavarici parivāradevakaḷukku Arici Ākavarici nel pālpōnakatu payaṟṟu pōnakattu kumā vamitu kumāra nālukaṟiyamutu Uppu miḷakumā nelsa viṟaku nellu Aṭaikkāyamitu 2 10 5 veṟṟilaikkum no karupucāṟu ku nel caṟkarai
Amitu munnāḻi vāḻaippaḻam 5 10 kkumāka nel nūlpuṭavai 4 kum gendha travyatukku nel 5 pariyaṭṭam 1 kku nel divasamum saṅkramamuḷ snapanamāṭṭi pariyaṭṭaru rumurtum Amitu ce yarku nel koṟṟu val vacca
nilam vatikkukiḻakku 2 kaṇāṟṟu 1 Itinōṭumaṭaiya nicati Orupala can=taṇamum citāri kaṟpūram kunṟiyumiṭuvatāka vaitta kaṇāṟṟu vaṟuku 4- kaṇāṟ
tiyōṭumaṭaiya vumitaṟku kiḻakku nila mekaṭaiya kucavakku ce ma śrīkā ceyvārku vaṭakkaṭaiya yumitaṟku I kku nan=tāviḷakku vum cittirai tiruvātirai tiruviḻāpu
tta nilam 5- kaṇāṟṟu nilam kaḷuyu ku vētivēḷ vāykkālukku teṟku tiyūr vāykkālukku vaṭakku mēṟkaṭaiya tiruppalippuram 3 sandiyum Eriya Irākaiy viḷakku pi
ṭippār mūvarkku vaitta nilam rākavaṭikaḷ mā vaitta nilam vatikku cci nilam
Digital edition of SII 34.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
